Welcome! Before you click NEXT and read the consent form, please wait for us to finish some preparations.


Researcher: insert the participant ID below and fill in your paper. Make sure that the screen is set up correctly.
consent_form:
Research Project Informed Consent

 

Principal Investigators

Paolo Rubino (EPFL - EL) - paolo.rubino@epfl.ch

Jeanne Le Moigne (EPFL - PH) - jeanne.lemoigne@epfl.ch

Lilin Liu (EPFL - PH) - lilin.liu@epfl.ch

Matthias Zanardi (EPFL - PH) - matthias.zanardi@epfl.ch

Mohamed Mamouri (EPFL - CS) - mohamed.mamouri@epfl.ch

 

Research Purpose

We invite you to participate in a survey study. Before you decide to participate, please ensure you understand the purpose and details of this study. Carefully read the information below, and if you have any unclear points or need more information, please ask the researchers. The entire survey will take about 10 minutes to complete.

 

Research Process

This study will be conducted in the form of an online survey. In the survey, you will first need to fill out some basic information about yourself. Then, you need to complete a color blindness test. After that, the main questions of the survey will start. You will see pictures of different people. For each picture we will ask you to answer several questions indicating how much different emotions are present in the displayed face. You will rate them on a scale from 1 to 5.  

 

Confidentiality of the Survey

Your responses to this survey will be kept confidential. Please do not disclose any of your personal sensitive information in the survey. This study does not pose any risks.

 

Contact Information

If you have any questions about this study, you can contact the researchers, whose information has already been provided above. If you have questions about your rights as a research participant, please contact any of the emails provided above.

 

Voluntary Participation

Your participation in this study is voluntary and you can resign at all time. By agreeing to participate you indicate that you understand the procedure and give consent to use your data for research purposes. 

Informed Consent

I have read and understood the provided information and have had the opportunity to ask questions. I voluntarily participate in the survey and can withdraw at any time without reason. By clicking "I give my consent" I agree to participate in the study with the conditions provided above.

If you agree and acknowledge the above content, please select the "I give my consent" option below to start answering the questions. If you do not agree or acknowledge the above content, please select the "I do not give my consent" option below to discontinue participation in this survey project.
